overall.description: First-person vehicle driving through an industrial solar farm facility at dusk in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera travels steadily along a paved corridor between illuminated industrial structures and overhead pipelines, passing under red pipeline bridges against a colorful sunset sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from low speed to steady cruising speed along the industrial corridor
approaching the first red pipeline bridge spanning the road ahead

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward through the industrial corridor between illuminated solar array structures

entered.detail: large industrial structure with translucent white panels and internal lighting running parallel to the road
matching industrial structure on the right side with illuminated interior and metal framework
large cylindrical industrial pipe running along the left side supported by metal trusses
red-painted pipeline bridge spanning across the road with warning text markings
industrial towers and structures visible on the horizon against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person vehicle view driving into an industrial solar farm corridor at dusk. The road is flanked by massive illuminated industrial structures on both sides, with a large overhead pipeline running along the left. The camera accelerates forward as a red pipeline bridge looms ahead against a colorful sunset sky.

events.description: passing underneath the first red pipeline bridge which temporarily blocks the sky view
second red pipeline bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the corridor, passing under the first pipeline bridge and approaching the second

entered.detail: second red-painted pipeline bridge with structural supports spanning the road ahead
yellow and black striped safety barriers along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through the enclosed industrial corridor, passing underneath the first red pipeline bridge. The illuminated solar structures remain prominent on both sides at close range, while a second red pipeline bridge appears in the distance ahead. Road barriers become visible along the right shoulder.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor opening to desert landscape

events.description: passing underneath the second red pipeline bridge
solar array structures begin to recede and open terrain becomes visible on the sides

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road past the second bridge as the enclosed corridor opens up to wider landscape views

entered.detail: desert landscape and open ground visible beyond the end of the solar array structures
scattered equipment and materials along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the second red pipeline bridge and continues along the road as the industrial corridor gradually opens up. The solar array structures recede into the distance on both sides, revealing open desert terrain beyond. The road continues straight toward distant industrial towers on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person vehicle journey through a dense industrial solar corridor that gradually opens into a vast desert landscape. It begins by accelerating forward between massive illuminated structures and a large overhead pipeline under a colorful sunset sky. As the vehicle maintains its speed, the camera passes beneath a red pipeline bridge and continues through the enclosed corridor, where road barriers appear along the shoulder and a second bridge looms in the distance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle glides under the second bridge, causing the solar arrays to recede on both sides. Finally, the industrial corridor expands into open desert terrain, leaving the road to stretch straight toward distant towers on the horizon.
